title: T-060 — ROOT: Pipeline views group (TableView + SplitView prototypes) (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-060 — ROOT: Pipeline views group

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.8, §17.12 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md pipeline_table + pipeline_split
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:54-132 (TableView + SplitView)

## Type
T0-root — workflow descriptor only. NOT executable. Defines the group of slice tasks that together translate the Pipeline Table + Split view prototypes into production and unify them with the existing Kanban view (T-059) under one tabbed page.

## Scope (this descriptor)
This task describes the Pipeline views group and points to atomic slice tasks. Do not implement any code under this task — implementation occurs in the slices listed below.

## Slice tasks under this root
- T-128: UI slice — Pipeline TableView (pipeline.jsx:54-88)
- T-129: UI slice — Pipeline SplitView + ProjectDetailPanel (pipeline.jsx:89-131)
- T-130: WIRING — wire Kanban (T-059) + Table (T-128) + Split (T-129) into tabbed pipeline page with shared filter/sort state
- T-131: PARITY — Playwright screenshot parity for all 3 views vs prototype + axe checks

## Workflow contract
1. Slices T-128 and T-129 execute in parallel; each ships its own RTL tests + component files.
2. T-130 executes after T-128 + T-129 complete; integrates all view modes into the pipeline route with shared state.
3. T-131 executes after T-130; runs Playwright parity vs the prototype and axe-violations check.

## Out of scope (root level)
- No production code lives at the root.
- Kanban view itself is handled in T-059.
- Gate modals are handled in T-061.

## Acceptance (root)
- All listed slices closed.
- T-130 wiring task closed with Kanban/Table/Split tabs switching correctly and shared filter/sort state persisted across views.
- T-131 parity task closed with Playwright screenshots + axe artifacts attached.
